title: Executive Assistant (Finance Head & Chairman)
description:
Job Description: Executive Assistant (Finance Head & Chairman)

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly capable Executive Assistant to provide direct support to both the Finance Head and Chairman. This role requires strong organizational skills, financial acumen, and exposure to commodities trading and U.S.-facing manufacturing or business operations. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, commercially aware, and able to operate confidently in a fast-paced, cross-border environment.

Key Responsibilities

Executive & Business Support

  • Provide end-to-end administrative and business support to the Finance Head and Chairman.
  • Manage calendars, meetings, travel arrangements, and confidential correspondence.
  • Prepare meeting agendas, take minutes, and follow up on action items.

Finance & Commercial Support

  • Assist with basic financial analysis, reports, cash flow tracking, and budget monitoring.
  • Support finance-related documentation including invoices, payment tracking, and expense management.
  • Liaise with internal finance teams, external auditors, banks, and advisors where required.

Trading & Operations Exposure

  • Support documentation and coordination related to commodities trading activities, including contracts, confirmations, and settlement support.
  • Assist in tracking trades, counterparties, and operational timelines.
  • Coordinate with operations, logistics, and supply chain teams when required.

U.S. & Cross-Border Business Support

  • Support matters related to U.S.-based manufacturing or business operations, including coordination across time zones.
  • Assist with preparation of materials for U.S. partners, customers, or stakeholders.
  • Ensure smooth communication between regional teams (Asia–U.S.).

Confidential & Ad-hoc Support

  • Handle sensitive information with the highest level of discretion.
  • Support special projects, presentations, and ad-hoc requests from senior management.

Requirements

  • Diploma / Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, Accounting, or related fields.
  • 3–6 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Management Assistant, or similar role.
  • Basic understanding of finance, accounting, and financial reporting.
  • Prior exposure to commodities trading, trading houses, or related industries is highly preferred.
  • Experience supporting U.S. business operations or American counterparts is a strong advantage.
  • Strong organizational, multitasking, and communication skills.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
  • High level of professionalism, discretion, and attention to detail.
  • Fluent in English; Mandarin is a plus (for regional coordination).

Nice to Have

  • Experience in manufacturing, trading, or supply chain environments.
  • Exposure to cross-border contracts or international trade documentation.
  • Comfortable working with senior stakeholders and tight deadlines.

postedCompany.description:
Do you still think the boutique agency cannot advanced your own tech recruitment career?

Are you considering to change your career path from big agency to enjoy the best commission structure and working with best in class tech clients in Singapore?

Join US!

We are the Singapore and China based technology recruitment agency and specialised in providing talent solution for internet and technology industry. Our client portfolio are including the global internet technology giants, technology MNC and Tech startup. Whatever technology clients you are think of? Yes we do have!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.

In this role you'll help our clients identify & hire talent people not only with the right skills and experience, but also the right motivational and cultural fit - people who'll stay and perform.
